_comment: Tier-2 for fenics stokes#: confirms the catalog's basix.ufl element-construction strings work in dolfinx 0.10. Taylor-Hood (P2v + P1), MINI (P1v + Bubble degree gdim+1, enriched, mixed with P1), and equal-order P1/P1 all construct valid FunctionSpaces. Strict size ordering TH(187) > MINI(139) > P1/P1(75) on the 4x4 unit-square triangulation. Verified empirically 2026-06-01 (dolfinx 0.10.0, basix 0.10.0).
